channel.title: Runtime-Support on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Runtime-Support on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Functions support for Python 3.14
item.description:
Azure Functions now supports Python 3.14 for local development and deployment to Linux-based Azure Functions plans. This lets apps move to Python 3.14 for security, longer support, and continued compatibility.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: Support for Python-2.7; 3.8 and PowerShell- 7.1; 7.2 will be retired on September 30, 2026
item.description:
Azure Automation will stop supporting Python 2.7, Python 3.8, and PowerShell 7.1/7.2 starting October 1, 2026. Runbooks may still run, but these runtimes will no longer receive security updates or bug fixes.

  • Source: Azure Updates
